name: Cinnamon Flop
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift together the sugar, flour, and baking powder.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg with the milk until combined.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the egg mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch round, 2-inch deep baking dish.
6. Sprinkle the cinnamon sugar evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Drizzle the melted butter over the top.
8. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
